scripts.setup:demo:cordova: cd demo && npm init --workspaces=false -y && npm --prefix . install -D cordova
scripts.setup:demo: npm run setup:demo:cordova && npm run setup:demo:config
scripts.setup:demo:android: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova platform add android
scripts.build:demo:android: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova build android
scripts.build:demo:android:release: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova build android --release -- --packageType=bundle
scripts.run:android: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova run android
scripts.setup:demo:ios: cd demo && npm --prefix . install -D ios-deploy xcode && npx --prefix . cordova platform add ios
scripts.build:demo:ios: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova build ios --device
scripts.build:demo:ios:release: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova build ios --device --release
scripts.run:ios: cd demo && npx --prefix . cordova run ios --device
scripts.refresh:common: npm run package && npm run clean:demo && npm run setup:demo
scripts.refresh:android: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:android && npm run build:demo:android
scripts.refresh:ios: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:ios && npm run build:demo:ios
scripts.restart:android: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:android && npm run run:android
scripts.restart:ios: npm run refresh:common && npm run setup:demo:ios && npm run run:ios
